recap:
- Agent Bricks simplifies the development of domain-specific agent systems, allowing users to focus on business problems rather than technical complexities.
- The platform reduces the time-to-value for AI agent implementations in enterprise settings through its abstraction of technical details.
- Four primary agent types are supported: Information Extraction (IE), Custom LLM (CLLM), Knowledge Assistant (KA), and Multi-Agent Supervisor (MAS).
- Information Extraction agents automate the gathering of structured data from unstructured sources like documents and emails.
- Custom LLMs are tailored language models optimized for specific tasks and datasets within a domain.
- Knowledge Assistants provide interactive question-answering capabilities using retrieval-augmented generation over knowledge bases.
- Multi-Agent Supervisors coordinate multiple specialized agents to complete complex tasks, functioning as a single agent with a toolkit if needed.
